zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线偏多震荡整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD价格位于67.6美元附近，略高于20日简单移动平均线SMA(20)=66.87，显示短期均线支撑较为稳固。价格在67.03至67.8区间波动，表明市场处于横盘整理阶段，多空力量暂时均衡，短线趋势偏多但缺乏强烈突破信号。

MACD值为0.405，呈现正值，意味着短期上涨动能存在，但未提供完整信号线数据，需警惕潜在回调压力。由于RSI数据缺失，超买超卖情况难以判断，但结合价格靠近近期高点，可适当关注回调风险。整体指标提示投资者以谨慎乐观态度对待市场。

支撑位主要在66.85和66.0美元附近，若价格下破这两点，将打破短期上行支撑，可能引发进一步回调。阻力位在67.8及68.5美元区域，突破后有望打开上涨空间。价格在阻力区间反复受压，可视为短线获利点或减仓参考。

交易策略上，建议短线多单可在支撑位附近布局，止损设在66.5美元下方以控制风险。中线投资者可耐心等待价格稳健突破67.8美元阻力，再考虑加仓布局。操作上应密切关注成交量变化和市场情绪，以灵活调整仓位，避免过度追高或盲目抄底。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is showing a mildly bullish short-term structure, trading at 67.6 and holding above its 20-day simple moving average of 66.87. The 24-hour gain of 0.57% and the session range between 67.03 and 67.8 indicate steady buying interest rather than aggressive momentum. Price action remains constructive as long as SOL stays above the SMA, suggesting that buyers continue to defend pullbacks and maintain control of the near-term trend.

The available momentum indicators also lean positive. MACD at 0.4054 remains in bullish territory, indicating upward momentum is still present. While the signal line and RSI values are unavailable, the positive MACD reading suggests the recent advance has not yet lost strength. Traders should nevertheless monitor for any weakening in momentum, particularly if price begins to struggle near recent highs, as that could signal consolidation before the next directional move.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around 67.0, corresponding closely with the session low, while stronger support emerges near the 66.8–66.9 region where the SMA(20) currently sits. On the upside, resistance appears near 67.8, the recent intraday high. A decisive break above this level could open the door toward the psychological 68.5–69.0 area, where profit-taking activity may increase and slow further gains.

For active traders, maintaining a bullish bias while price remains above 66.8 appears reasonable. Momentum-oriented participants may look for breakout opportunities on a sustained move above 67.8, ideally accompanied by expanding volume. More conservative traders could wait for pullbacks toward support zones before considering entries. Risk management remains essential, with protective stops below key support levels, as a break beneath 66.8 would weaken the current bullish outlook and increase the likelihood of a deeper corrective move.
